# NOCKO Information Technology
> NOCKO is a Dubai-based IT services company providing IT support, network infrastructure, cloud solutions, and cybersecurity for businesses across the UAE (Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah).

## About
NOCKO delivers managed IT services, 24/7 IT support, structured cabling, cloud migrations, and cybersecurity solutions to businesses across the United Arab Emirates. Office located in Dubai (Office R20-42, Wavez Residence, Wadi Al Safa 2). Contact: +971542448888, info@nocko.com.

## Key Pages
- [Homepage](https://nocko.com): Overview of all IT services and company
- [Services](https://nocko.com/services): Full list of IT services offered
- [IT Support](https://nocko.com/services/it-support): 24/7 IT support and helpdesk
- [Managed IT](https://nocko.com/services/managed-it): Managed IT services for businesses
- [Cloud](https://nocko.com/services/cloud): Cloud migration and infrastructure
- [Cybersecurity](https://nocko.com/services/cybersecurity): Cybersecurity solutions UAE
- [IT AMC](https://nocko.com/services/it-amc): Annual maintenance contracts Dubai
- [IT Consulting](https://nocko.com/services/it-consulting): IT strategy and consulting
- [Structured Cabling](https://nocko.com/services/structured-cabling): Network cabling Dubai
- [About](https://nocko.com/about): Company background and credentials
- [Case Studies](https://nocko.com/case-studies): Real client projects with outcomes
- [Articles](https://nocko.com/articles): IT guides and resources
- [Contact](https://nocko.com/contact): Office address, phone, email
